The research text discusses the role of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in improving encryption in data privacy. The attack mechanism described is the use of AI-driven cryptanalysis to breach encryption and access sensitive information.

The impact of this attack is significant, as it can compromise the confidentiality, integrity, and authenticity of sensitive data. The use of AI to automate key generation, detect vulnerabilities in cryptographic protocols, and enable adaptive responses to real-time security threats can improve the effectiveness of encryption methods.
